GEOMINERpress / to search
    Base layer
    Deposits

    Copied
    DD— move cursor over map
    DMS—
    0 pins

    Shortcuts

    1–5Switch base layer
    /Focus the search box
    CClear all pins
    XToggle crosshair guides
    + −Zoom in / out
    ?Show / hide this panel
    EscClose panels and popups
    ↑ ↓Move through search results

    Search a mineral to light up every site that produces it; pick a mine to fly there and open its dossier. Click any coloured dot for details, or click empty map to drop a coordinate pin. Click any coordinate row to copy it. Double-click a legend entry to view that mineral alone. The address bar always holds a shareable link to your current view.

    Data sources Facilities & production: Jasansky et al. 2023 (CC BY 4.0) · Mined-land footprints: Maus et al. 2022 (CC BY 4.0) · Basemaps: OpenStreetMap, CARTO, OpenTopoMap, Esri. Assembled by T James.
